TEXTUAL.question: In Note 7 of the consolidated financial results, what was the exact legal body in the United States that filed the indictment against the executive director of AEL, and in which specific district court was this case filed?

In the auditor's review report, what is the exact Standard on Review Engagement number cited by Shah Dhandharia & Co LLP as the basis for conducting their review, and what is the full name of that standard?

According to Note 6 of the consolidated financial results, what exact percentage stake did Adani Defence Systems and Technologies Limited acquire in Air Works India (Engineering) Private Limited during Q2 FY26?

In the press release, what exact phrase does Chairman Gautam Adani use to describe AEL's role in relation to India's national development, specifically in the context of the Navi Mumbai Airport inauguration?
According to the standalone financial results notes, what is the exact membership number of Jatin Jalundhwala who signed the Board outcome document as Company Secretary?
In Note 13 of the consolidated financial results, what exact amount has AEL deposited as customs duties under protest, and at how many locations have demand notices been received?
According to the auditor's review report paragraph 10, what three specific financial conditions are described for subsidiary companies that have nevertheless been prepared on a going concern basis?

In the Board outcome letter, what were the exact prior intimation dates mentioned before the board meeting of November 4, 2025, and what regulation number governs the disclosure requirement cited in the subject line?
According to Note 14(a) of the consolidated financial results, on what two specific dates was interest paid on the Unrated, Unlisted, Secured Non-Convertible Debentures of Rs. 1,950 crores?

In the ESG section of the earnings presentation, what exact award did AEL receive at the Transformance ESG Awards, and what specific initiative by Adani Natural Resources won the 'Leadership in Climate Action' award?
According to Note 3(b) of the standalone financial results, what exact number of equity shares of AWL did ACLLP sell in Q2 FY26, and what percentage of paid-up equity capital did this represent?
In the auditor's emphasis of matter paragraph 11, what specific type of fee is under litigation/arbitration for MIAL, covering what exact time period?
According to the SEBI circular reference cited in Annexure C of the Board outcome document, what is the exact circular number and its date that governs the rights issue disclosure requirements?

In Note 4 of the standalone financial results, what exact number of Ambuja equity shares did AEL receive as consideration following the NCLT order approving the ACL Scheme, and what was the date the scheme became effective?

According to the auditor's UDIN number disclosed at the end of the consolidated review report, what is the exact UDIN, and who is the named partner who signed the report along with their membership number?

In the module sales bar chart, what are the domestic and export MW figures for Q1 FY26 and Q2 FY26?
